_comment: Runtime configuration. Copy to config/runtime.json and adjust for your setup.

memory._comment: Models used by the memory pipeline. Use provider-qualified IDs (e.g. 'moonshot/kimi-k2.5', 'bailian/text-embedding-v4') or bare model IDs if the provider is globally defaulted.

lightweightLlm._comment: Fast/cheap model used for lightweight tasks such as session title generation. Must be explicitly set — no automatic fallback.

talkerThinker._comment: When enabled, the thinker runs as an async PG job after each turn (requires PG backend and a job consumer). Set enabled:false for local/SQLite setups.
